title: 3 Pcs Catnip Toys for Cats,Santa Christmas Plush Toy,Cat Chew Interactive Toy and Teething Toys,Catnip Toy for Indoor Cats Gifts
features: 【Package Contents】:You will get 3 Pcs Christmas catnip toys in the shape of Santa Claus, gingerbread Man and reindeer to create a strong Christmas atmosphere, perfect for cats to play indoors or outdoors, these cute Christmas cat toys are easy to attract the attention of cats and will be the ideal playmate for your pet.

【Quality Materials】:Our cat toys for indoor cats are made of quality plush fabrics and PP cotton, and scented with mint, these kitten toys are safe and durable, soft and comfortable, and do not harm your cat's paws. Wear resistance, not easy to tear. Perfect for pets to chew, scratch and play.

【Fun Pet Interactive Toys】:These soft cat plush toys are easy to attract your pet's attention, stimulate the cat's interest, you can interact with your cat and play together, help promote cat exercise, and make you and your cat closer. When you don't have time to spend with your cat, these pet toys will be the ideal playmate for your cat, reducing boredom and anxiety.

【The Ideal Gift】:These Christmas cat chew interactive toys are the ideal Christmas gift for your pet to show you love them, these cat teething toys emit the mint scent that cats love and can help promote exercise and fun interactive games to relieve boredom or stress. Small, lightweight and easy to carry, our cat toys are perfect for cats to play with indoors or outdoors.

【Helps Clean Teeth】:These kitten catnip toys help keep your pet's teeth clean, and these cat interactive toys help clean your cat's teeth and keep your breath fresh while your cat chews. Exercise your cat's chewing ability and improve your cat's dental health.
